name: mobile_chat
description: 對話泡泡風格，適合手機通訊軟體展示。圓角柔和、色彩溫暖、易於閱讀。

styles.body: margin: 0; padding: 2px; background-color: #f0f2f5; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
styles..container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); overflow: hidden;
styles..title: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: #ffffff; padding: 2px 2px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.th: padding: 1px 2px; text-align: center; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #495057; border-bottom: 2px solid #e9ecef; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.td: padding: 1px 2px; font-size: 14px; color: #212529; border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef; text-align: center; line-height: 1.5;
styles..footer: background-color: #f8f9fa; color: #6c757d; padding: 1px 2px; font-size: 12px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #e9ecef;

warning.description: 需注意、接近閾值、待觀察
